description: Application applies context-aware output encoding to all user-controlled data before rendering in HTML, JavaScript, CSS, or URL contexts. Uses framework auto-escaping (Django, Jinja2 autoescape, React JSX) rather than manual sanitization. Combined with CSP headers (CME-905), provides defense-in-depth against XSS.

cvss_vector_impacts.rationale: XSS payloads are HTML-encoded and rendered as text, not executed
Cannot inject scripts to modify page behavior or steal session tokens

verification.method: Verify template engine auto-escaping is enabled and no raw/safe bypasses for user-controlled data
